summary: Completed testing of 'Histórico de Assinaturas' feature. All backend endpoints and frontend functionality are working correctly. The feature allows users to view their digitally signed documents with pagination, statistics, and validation links.

GET /api/assinaturas/historico.pagination: Working with page and page_size parameters

elements_verified.statistics_cards: 4 cards showing Total, Válidos, Últimos 30 dias, Tipos - WORKING
elements_verified.signatures_table: Shows document, validation code, date, signers, status, actions - WORKING
elements_verified.pagination: Working with page size selector - WORKING
elements_verified.signatures_by_type_section: Shows breakdown by document type - WORKING

seed_data_creation: None - used existing signature data (2 DOEM signatures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Histórico de Assinaturas feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints /api/assinaturas/historico and /api/assinaturas/estatisticas return correct data. Frontend page at /historico-assinaturas displays statistics cards, search functionality, paginated table with signature records, and validation links. Navigation link 'Assinaturas' is visible in the header menu. Route is protected and requires authentication. Test user has 2 DOEM signatures in the database.
